name: Topological Signatures of Context-Level Reliability in TabPFN

description: arXiv:2607.17962v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: TabPFN is a transformer-based foundation model for tabular prediction that performs inference without task-specific training by conditioning on a support set and query inputs. Despite its strong empirical performance, its internal behavior on structurally difficult tabular geometries remains poorly understood. We study this behavior using zigzag...
author: James Hu, Mahdi Ghelichi
